description: Deleted evolution.manifest.json during root audit, classifying it as a stale artifact
correction: David caught the error — evolution.manifest.json is Rigbys component registry and belongs in root permanently
root-cause: rigby-root-audit skill lacks explicit protection for evolution.manifest.json, similar to how CLAUDE.md and SYSTEM.md are protected. The file was treated as an ephemeral artifact rather than a permanent system file.
prevention: Add evolution.manifest.json to the ignore list in the rigby-root-audit skill alongside CLAUDE.md, SYSTEM.md, and README.md
